Meaning.En: A dark, savory, slightly sweet and tangy fermented sauce used as a condiment or ingredient, originally developed in Worcester, England.
Meaning.Example: She added a dash of Worcestershire sauce to the beef stew for extra depth of flavor.

Situation.Vi: Nhà bếp thêm sốt Worcestershire vào món nướng hoặc súp để tăng hương vị umami.
Situation.En: A chef adds Worcestershire sauce to grilled meats or soups to enhance umami and complexity.

Situation.Vi: Người tiêu dùng thường nhầm lẫn giữa Worcestershire và nước tương (soy sauce).
Situation.En: Consumers often confuse Worcestershire sauce with soy sauce due to similar color and savory profile.

Meaning.En: A city name; most notably Worcester in Worcestershire, England, or Worcester in Massachusetts, USA.
Meaning.Example: Worcester, Massachusetts, is home to several universities and a historic downtown district.

Situation.Vi: Người dân địa phương gọi tắt thành phố Worcester khi nói chuyện trong cộng đồng.
Situation.En: Locals refer to the city as “Worcester” in everyday conversation.
